message:
perf(storage): amortize base-dir canonicalize in process_attachments, improve path error handling

process_attachments now short-circuits on empty attachment lists
without requiring the base directory to exist, and canonicalizes the
base directory once up front via a new
resolve_attachment_source_path_from_canonical_base helper that all
per-path resolutions use.  The original
resolve_attachment_source_path remains as a public convenience that
canonicalizes on each call for single-path callers.

Path error handling improved: candidate.canonicalize() now
distinguishes NotFound from other IO errors for clearer diagnostics.
resolve_source_attachment_path_opt drops the pre-existence check and
relies on canonicalize failure instead.

New test: process_attachments with an empty list succeeds even when
the base directory does not exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
